citations: LLM proposal - one conversation_summary card containing an entire 8000 word transcript
payload.reason: The proposal is an entire transcript-sized conversation summary, which is too broad, noisy, and non-durable to store as a memory item. It also appears to preserve the conversation itself rather than a stable, salient fact.
